analysis.reasoning: Core message: Positive, apolitical praise of Chinese acrobatic students, highlighting talent and beauty with hashtags like #AmazingChina and #acrobatics, citing Xinhua. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral) – Not present; no mention of the West or hostility. CH2 (China benevolent power) – Not present; no reference to international cooperation or global role. CH3 (epic history) – Not present; no historical framing or adversity. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – Not present; no political or governance claims. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not present; no linkage to government achievements or policy success. CH6 (China interesting in culture/nature/heritage) – Applicable; showcases cultural performance arts and admiration for Chinese people and acrobatics, promoting cultural appeal. Conclusion: Only CH6 fits.
